_comment: Quick FEL machinery test. Kept gamma=100.41 (real regime) but: (1) reduced sigma-position z 50->10 um so the undulator entry (~ 2*sigma_z*gamma_frame^2) is reached early (~step 25 instead of ~290); (2) reduced z-resolution 400->160 (still dispersion-stable) so radiation reaches the exit plane in ~150 steps instead of ~400; (3) total-time sized for ~300 steps. Expect radiated_power_W to rise from 0 to nonzero in the later (~second half) rows of radiation_1.csv.
